actionCalls.description: Performs the action add cart item.
actionCalls.name: Add_Cart_Item
actionCalls.label: Add Cart Item

actionCalls.description: Creates a reservation for the cart.
actionCalls.name: Create_Inventory_Reservation_From_Cart
actionCalls.label: Create Inventory Reservation From Cart

actionCalls.description: Deletes the inventory reservation for the cart.
actionCalls.name: Delete_Inventory_Reservation_From_Cart
actionCalls.label: Delete Inventory Reservation From Cart

assignments.description: Assigns the changeItemFeeInputRepresentation to the changeItemFees collection.
assignments.name: Add_Change_Item_Fee_Input
assignments.label: Add Change Item Fee Input

assignments.description: Assigns the active stages for a flow without return fees.
assignments.name: Assign_Active_Stages
assignments.label: Assign Active Stages

assignments.description: Assigns the cart item to the variable cartItemInput.
assignments.name: Assign_Cart_Item_Input
assignments.label: Assign Cart Item Input

assignments.description: Assigns inputs to the cart to exchange inputs.
assignments.name: Assign_Cart_To_Exchange_Input
assignments.label: Assign Cart To Exchange Input

assignments.description: Assigns the cart totals to the variable cartSummaryTotals.
assignments.name: Assign_Cart_Totals
assignments.label: Assign Cart Totals

assignments.description: Assigns the changeItemInputRepresentation to the changeItems collection.
assignments.name: Assign_Change_Input
assignments.label: Assign Change Input

assignments.description: Assigns the selectedOrderItem to the variable ChangeItem.
assignments.name: Assign_Change_Item
assignments.label: Assign Change Item

assignments.description: Assigns the changeItemFee to the variable changeItemFeeInputRepresentation.
assignments.name: Assign_Change_Item_Fee_Input
assignments.label: Assign Change Item Fee Input

assignments.description: Assigns changeItem to the variable changeItemInputRepresentation.
assignments.name: Assign_Change_Item_Input
assignments.label: Assign Change Item Input

assignments.description: Assigns changesItems to the changeItem collection.
assignments.name: Assign_Change_Item_List
assignments.label: Assign Change Item List

assignments.description: Assigns the number of changeItems with fees to the variable changeItemWithFeesCount.
assignments.name: Assign_Change_Item_With_Fees_Count
assignments.label: Assign Change Item With Fees Count

assignments.description: Assigns the changeItem changeItemFees to the variable changeItemFees.
assignments.name: Assign_changeItemFees_List
assignments.label: Assign changeItemFees List

assignments.description: Assign the confirmation text to the variable confirmationImage.
assignments.name: Assign_Confirmation_Image
assignments.label: Assign Confirmation Image

assignments.description: Assigns the delivery address to the variable deliveryPreview.
assignments.name: Assign_Delivery_Preview
assignments.label: Assign Delivery Preview

assignments.description: Assigns the inventory reservation ID to the variable inventoryReservationId.
assignments.name: Assign_Inventory_Reservation_Id
assignments.label: Assign Inventory Reservation Id

assignments.description: Assigns the itemFeesToReturn to the variable itemFeesToReturn.
assignments.name: Assign_Item_Fees_To_Return_List
assignments.label: Assign Item Fees To Return List

assignments.description: Assigns the current location to the variable selectedLocation.
assignments.name: Assign_Location
assignments.label: Assign Location

assignments.description: Assigns the current location group to the variable selectedLocationGroup.
assignments.name: Assign_Location_Group
assignments.label: Assign Location Group

assignments.description: Assigns the paymentAuthorizationInfo to the variable paymentInfo.
assignments.name: Assign_Payment_Info
assignments.label: Assign Payment Info

assignments.description: Adds the paymentInfo to the paymentInfoList collection.
assignments.name: Assign_Payment_Info_In_Submit_Cart_Input
assignments.label: Assign Payment Info In Submit Cart Input

assignments.description: Assigns inputs to the preview cart to exchange order inputs.
assignments.name: Assign_Preview_Cart_To_Exchange_Order_Input
assignments.label: Assign Preview Cart To Exchange Order Input

assignments.description: Assigns the price book entry ID to the variable selectedPricebookEntryId.
assignments.name: Assign_Price_Book_Entry
assignments.label: Assign Price Book Entry

assignments.description: Assigns the selected product ID to the variable selectedProductId.
assignments.name: Assign_Product
assignments.label: Assign Product

assignments.description: Assigns the returnOrderLineItemFeeInputRepresentation to the variable returnOrderInputRepresentation.
assignments.name: Assign_Return_Order_Input
assignments.label: Assign Return Order Input

assignments.description: Assigns the orderLineItemFee to the variable returnOrderLineItemFeeInputRepresentation.
assignments.name: Assign_Return_Order_Line_Item_Fee_Input
assignments.label: Assign Return Order Line Item Fee Input

assignments.description: Adds the returnOrderLineItemFeeInputRepresentation to the returnOrderLineItemInputRepresentation collection.
assignments.name: Assign_Return_Order_Line_Item_Fees
assignments.label: Assign Return Order Line Item Fees

assignments.description: Assigns the current order line item to the variable returnOrderLineItemInputRepresentation.
assignments.name: Assign_Return_Order_Line_Item_Input
assignments.label: Assign Return Order Line Item Input

assignments.description: Assign the order owner ID to the variable orderOwnerId.
assignments.name: Assign_Selected_User
assignments.label: Assign Selected User

assignments.description: Assigns the current web store record to the selectedWebstore variable.
assignments.name: Assign_Selected_Webstore
assignments.label: Assign Selected Webstore

assignments.description: Assigns inputs to the submit cart to exchange order inputs.
assignments.name: Assign_Submit_Cart_To_Exchange_Order_Input
assignments.label: Assign Payment Info Submit Cart To Exchange Order Input

assignments.description: Assigns the current web store to the variable selectedWebstore.
assignments.name: Assign_WebStore
assignments.label: Assign WebStore

assignments.description: Clears the variable returnOrderLineItemInputRepresentation.
assignments.name: Clean_Return_Order_Line_Item_Fees_Input
assignments.label: Clean Return Order Line Item Fees Input

assignments.description: Clears the variable changeItemInputRepresentation.
assignments.name: Clear_Change_Item_Fees
assignments.label: Clear Change Item Fees

assignments.description: Assigns the cartInventoryReservationOutputRepresentation to the variable createInventoryReservationOutput.
assignments.name: Create_Cart_Inventory_Reservation_Result
assignments.label: Create Cart Inventory Reservation Result

assignments.description: Assigns values to the failure message.
assignments.name: Failure_Error_Message
assignments.label: Failure Error Message

assignments.description: Assigns values to the variable cartInput.
assignments.name: Initialize_Cart_Input
assignments.label: Initialize Cart Input

assignments.description: Assigns inputs to the cart inventory reservation inputs.
assignments.name: Initialize_Cart_Inventory_Reservation_Input_Reservation_Type
assignments.label: Initialize Cart Inventory Reservation Input and Reservation Type

assignments.description: Assigns the error message for an invalid account ID.
assignments.name: Invalid_Account_ID_Error_Message
assignments.label: Invalid Account ID Error Message

assignments.description: Assigns values to the invocable action error message.
assignments.name: Set_Invocable_Action_Error_Message
assignments.label: Set Invocable Action Error Message

assignments.name: Set_Locked_Order_Summary_Error_Message
assignments.label: Set Locked Order Summary Error Message

assignments.description: Assigns the error message for a no items error.
assignments.name: Set_No_Items_Error_Message
assignments.label: Set No Items Error Message

assignments.description: Assigns the error message for a wrong entity error.
assignments.name: Set_Wrong_Entity_Error_Message
assignments.label: Set Wrong Entity Error Message

assignments.description: Assigns the Exchange_Order_Cart_Preview_Stage to the current stage.
assignments.name: Update_Exchange_Order_Cart_Preview_Stage
assignments.label: Update Exchange Order Cart Preview Stage

assignments.description: Assigns the Exchange_Order_Delivery_Option_Stage to the current stage.
assignments.name: Update_Exchange_Order_Delivery_Option_Stage
assignments.label: Update Exchange Order Delivery Option Stage

assignments.description: Assigns the Exchange_Order_Preview_Submit_Stage to the current stage.
assignments.name: Update_Exchange_Order_Preview_Submit_Stage
assignments.label: Update Exchange Order Preview Submit Stage

assignments.description: Assigns the Exchange_Order_Product_Selection_Stage to the current stage.
assignments.name: Update_Exchange_Order_Product_Selection_Stage
assignments.label: Update Exchange Order Product Selection Stage

assignments.description: Assigns the current stage for the return product selection.
assignments.name: Update_Return_Product_Selection_Stage
assignments.label: Update Return Product Selection Stage

constants.description: Stores the path of the confirmation image.
constants.name: Confirmation_Image

constants.description: Stores the image for the error output invocable action.
constants.name: Error_Output_Invocable_Action_Image

constants.description: Stores the image for the error output No Items to Return.
constants.name: Error_Output_No_Items_To_Return_Image

constants.description: Stores the image for the error output Wrong Entity.
constants.name: Error_Output_Wrong_Entity_Image

constants.description: Stores the text for the return order activated status.
constants.name: Return_Order_Activated_Status

constants.description: Stores the text for the return order life cycle type.
constants.name: Return_Order_Life_Cycle_Type

constants.description: Stores the text for the return order pending status.
constants.name: Return_Order_Pending_Status

decisions.description: Determines whether the account exists.
decisions.name: Account_Exists
decisions.label: Account Exists?

decisions.description: Determines whether a cart exists.
decisions.name: Cart_Exists
decisions.label: Cart Exists?

decisions.description: Determines whether the selected exchange product exists.
decisions.name: Does_Exchange_Product_Exist
decisions.label: Does Exchange Product Exist?

decisions.description: Determines whether the exchange product exists before adding to cart.
decisions.name: Does_Exchange_Product_Exist_based_on_SKU
decisions.label: Does Exchange Product Exist based on SKU?

decisions.description: Determines whether a fee product exists.
decisions.name: Does_Fee_Product_Exist
decisions.label: Does Fee Product Exist?

decisions.description: Determines whether the order summary has a price book.
decisions.name: Does_Order_Summary_Have_PriceBook
decisions.label: Does Order Summary Have PriceBook?

decisions.description: Determines whether the price book entry exists.
decisions.name: Does_Price_Book_Entry_Exist
decisions.label: Does Price Book Entry Exist?

decisions.description: Determines whether an inventory reservation exists.
decisions.name: Inventory_Reservation_Exists
decisions.label: Inventory Reservation Exists?

decisions.description: Determines whether a location group is selected.
decisions.name: Is_Location_Group_Type
decisions.label: Is Location Group Type?

decisions.description: Determines whether the payment authorization was successful.
decisions.name: Is_Payment_Authorization_Successful
decisions.label: Is Payment Authorization Successful?

decisions.description: Determines whether a payment is required.
decisions.name: Is_Payment_Required
decisions.label: Is Payment Required?

decisions.description: Determines whether the payment screen should be displayed.
decisions.name: Is_Payment_Screen_Required
decisions.label: Is Payment Screen Required?

decisions.description: Determines whether the web store inventory source is enabled.
decisions.name: Is_Web_Store_Inventory_Enabled
decisions.label: Is Web Store Inventory Enabled?

decisions.description: Determines whether items are available for return.
decisions.name: Items_Available_to_Return
decisions.label: Items Available to Return?

decisions.description: Determines whether guest checkout is needed.
decisions.name: Needs_Guest_Access
decisions.label: Needs Guest Access?

decisions.description: Determines whether a location and location group selection is needed.
decisions.name: Needs_Location_Group_and_Location_Selection
decisions.label: Needs Location Group and Location Selection?

decisions.description: Determines whether a product is added.
decisions.name: Product_Added
decisions.label: Product Added?

decisions.description: Determines whether a product is provided.
decisions.name: Product_Provided
decisions.label: Product Provided?

decisions.description: Determines whether the reservation creation was successful.
decisions.name: Reservation_Success
decisions.label: Reservation Success?

decisions.description: Determines whether to show the Fees screen.
decisions.name: Show_Fee_Screen
decisions.label: Show Fee Screen?

decisions.description: Determines whether a location group is selected.
decisions.name: Use_Location_Groups
decisions.label: Use Location Groups?

decisions.description: Determines whether the order summary is valid.
decisions.name: Valid_Order_Summary
decisions.label: Valid Order Summary?

decisions.description: Determines whether Return Fees is selected.
decisions.name: With_Return_Fee
decisions.label: With Return Fee?

loops.description: Loops through the changeItems collection for return fees.
loops.name: Assign_Change_Items_for_Return_Fees
loops.label: Assign Change Items for Return Fees

loops.description: Loops through the delivery groups in order to assign the delivery preview.
loops.name: Assign_Delivery_Group_Preview
loops.label: Assign Delivery Group Preview

recordLookups.name: Get_All_Order_Item_Summary_Relationships
recordLookups.label: Get All Order Item Summary Relationships

recordLookups.description: Get Order Summary for the record Id passed.
recordLookups.name: Get_Order_Summary
recordLookups.label: Get Order Summary

recordLookups.description: Gets the price book entry record.
recordLookups.name: Get_Price_Book_Entry
recordLookups.label: Get Price Book Entry

recordLookups.description: Gets the web store record for the order summary.
recordLookups.name: Get_WebStore_From_Order_Summary
recordLookups.label: Get WebStore from Order Summary

fields.name: Error_Output_Message
fields.fieldText:
{!errorMessageTitle}

{!errorMessage}

screens.description: Displays the return product selection screen.
screens.name: Exchange_Product_Selection
screens.label: Exchange Product Selection

screens.description: Displays the fee changes selection screen.
screens.name: Fee_Changes_Selection
screens.label: Fee Changes Selection

screens.description: Displays the preview cart to exchange order screen.
screens.name: Preview_Cart_To_Exchange_Screen
screens.label: Preview Cart To Exchange Screen

screens.description: Displays the product selection screen for returns.
screens.name: Return_Product_Selection
screens.label: Return Product Selection

screens.description: Displays the delivery group selection screen.
screens.name: Select_Delivery_Group
screens.label: Select Delivery Group

screens.description: Displays the web store and location group selection screen.
screens.name: Select_Webstore_and_Location_Group
screens.label: Select Webstore and Location Group

stages.description: The stage where a cart is previewed.
stages.name: Exchange_Order_Cart_Preview_Stage
stages.label: Preview cart

stages.description: The stage where a delivery option is selected.
stages.name: Exchange_Order_Delivery_Option_Stage
stages.label: Enter shipping and delivery details

stages.description: The stage where an exchange is previewed and submitted.
stages.name: Exchange_Order_Preview_Submit_Stage
stages.label: Preview and submit order

stages.description: The stage where an exchange product is selected.
stages.name: Exchange_Order_Product_Selection_Stage
stages.label: Select new products for exchange

stages.description: The stage where a return product is selected.
stages.name: Return_Order_Creation_Stage
stages.label: Select products for return

textTemplates.description: Shows the error output of the invocable action
textTemplates.name: Error_Output_Invocable_Message
textTemplates.text: Close this window and check the order summary page for updated information.

textTemplates.name: Error_Output_Locked_Order_Summary
textTemplates.text: This order summary is locked while background processes run. Try again later.

textTemplates.name: Error_Output_Locked_Order_Summary_Title
textTemplates.text: The Order Summary is Locked.

textTemplates.description: Shows the error output when no account is found.
textTemplates.name: Error_Output_No_Account_Found
textTemplates.text: No account found.

textTemplates.description: Shows the error output when no account found fault message.
textTemplates.name: Error_Output_No_Account_Found_Fault
textTemplates.text: To place an Exchange, a valid account must exist on the Order Summary.

textTemplates.description: Shows the error output when there are no items to return.
textTemplates.name: Error_Output_No_Items_To_Return
textTemplates.text: When an order has items you can return, you'll find them here.

textTemplates.description: Shows the error output header if there are no items to return.
textTemplates.name: Error_Output_No_Items_To_Return_Header
textTemplates.text: Nothing to Return

textTemplates.name: Error_Output_Unmanaged_Order
textTemplates.text: You can only run this flow on a managed order summary.

textTemplates.name: Error_Output_Unmanaged_Order_Title
textTemplates.text: The specified order summary is unmanaged.

textTemplates.description: Shows the error output when the entity is wrong.
textTemplates.name: Error_Output_Wrong_Entity
textTemplates.text: This is where you'd return items from an order. To return an order, start from the order summary page.

textTemplates.description: Shows the error output header when the entity is wrong.
textTemplates.name: Error_Output_Wrong_Entity_Header
textTemplates.text: We don't think you meant to come here.

textTemplates.name: Header_EnterBillingInformationHeader
textTemplates.text: Enter billing information

textTemplates.name: Header_EnterShippingAddress
textTemplates.text: Provide a shipping address

textTemplates.name: Header_ExchangeConfirmation
textTemplates.text: You're all set. Your exchange was processed.

textTemplates.name: Header_ExchangePreview
textTemplates.text: Exchange preview

textTemplates.name: Header_OrderPreview
textTemplates.text: Order preview

textTemplates.name: Header_SelectDeliveryOption
textTemplates.text: Select a delivery option

textTemplates.name: Header_SelectFees
textTemplates.text: Select a return fee type and value for each returned item.

textTemplates.name: Header_SelectFeesPrompt
textTemplates.text: Select the products with return fee.

textTemplates.name: Header_SelectProductAndQuantity
textTemplates.text: Add products to the order

textTemplates.name: Header_SelectQuantity
textTemplates.text: Select the quantity to return and the return reason.

textTemplates.name: Header_SelectReturnItem
textTemplates.text: Select from these available items to return.

textTemplates.name: Header_WebStoreSelectionHeader
textTemplates.text: Select a store

variables.description: Stores the boolean value for whether return fees are allowed.
variables.name: allowReturnFees

variables.description: Stores the count for a change item with fees.
variables.name: changeItemWithFeesCount

variables.description: Stores the boolean value for isError.
variables.name: isError

variables.description: Stores whether a web store inventory source is configured.
variables.name: isWebStoreInventoryConfigured

variables.description: Stores the preview for return output.
variables.name: previewReturnOutput

variables.description: Stores the order summary record ID.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: Stores the selected location external reference.
variables.name: selectedLocationExternalReference

variables.description: Stores the selected location group ID.
variables.name: selectedLocationGroupId

variables.description: Stores the selected order item summaries.
variables.name: selectedOrderItemSummaries

variables.description: Stores the selected price book entry ID.
variables.name: selectedPricebookEntryId

variables.description: Stores the selected reason for fees.
variables.name: selectedReasonForFees
